title: Tender Peruvian Cheese Stew
description: A sweet, chewy Peruvian stew that showcases Wensleydale cheese and bonito shavings in a rich achiote and tomato sauce.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Stir in tomato puree and achiote paste, cooking for 2 minutes to blend flavors.
Pour in chicken stock and bring the mixture to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, add diced Wensleydale cheese, stirring until the cheese melts into a smooth sauce.
Sprinkle the bonito shavings over the top, allowing them to warm through without cooking further.
Season the stew with salt to taste, then cover and let it simmer for 20 minutes to develop depth.
Remove the lid and stir in chopped cilantro just before serving.
Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary, adding more salt or achiote if desired.
Ladle the stew into bowls, garnish with a sprinkle of fresh cilantro, and serve hot.
